name: Hayes, Warren
evidence: Multiple people named Warren Hayes tie to Georgetown/78628 (a LinkedIn 'Warren Hayes - Austin', a pest-control/nursery owner, and a 2023 obituary for an East Austin entrepreneur memorialized in Georgetown). No occupation/employer in the record and no way to corroborate which one this is; single small-dollar giver to Travillion and Shea. Not confidently identifiable.

name: Tiemann, Robert
resolved_employer: Tiemann Land and Cattle Development, Inc. (president); also a real-estate/tax attorney
evidence: Robert M. 'Rob' Tiemann, UT Law 1975, is a Pflugerville real-estate/taxation attorney and president of Tiemann Land and Cattle Development, a Central Texas land developer/homebuilder (member, Texas Association of Builders). Office at 21100 Carries Ranch Rd, Pflugerville 78660 matches the donor zip; he and Carrie Parker Tiemann are noted area property developers.

name: Radford, Kent
resolved_employer: Alotten Inc. (CEO); previously co-founder & General Counsel of CS Disco Inc.
evidence: Kent Radford, JD (UT Austin), is CEO of Alotten Inc., an Austin people/HR-technology startup (founded 2022), and was co-founder and General Counsel of legal-tech firm CS Disco Inc. (2012-2021). The donor record lists exactly 'CEO, Alotten Inc.' and a Spicewood/Travis-County address consistent with the Austin tech founder.

name: Tsao, Eric (Mr.)
evidence: An Eric Tsao is recorded at Mont Blanc Dr, Bee Cave, TX 78738 (public-records match to the donor zip), so the individual likely exists there, but no occupation or employer could be confirmed for him; the several LinkedIn 'Eric Tsao' profiles are out-of-state. Cannot assign an industry.

name: Milloy, Ross
resolved_employer: Austin-San Antonio Corridor Council (president); former Mayor of San Marcos; registered TX lobbyist
evidence: Ross Milloy has been president since 1994 of the Austin-San Antonio Corridor Council, a regional public/private nonprofit that lobbied for commuter rail and SH-130; he is a former Mayor of San Marcos and a registered Texas lobbyist. San Marcos/78667 address matches the Corridor Council's PO Box 1618 San Marcos. Transportation/infrastructure advocacy focus.

name: Jeff Travillion Campaign
resolved_employer: Candidate campaign committee of Jeff Travillion (Travis County Commissioner, Precinct 1)
evidence: This is not an individual but the officeholder campaign committee of Jeff Travillion, Democratic Travis County Commissioner (Pct 1); Austin 78768 PO-box zip. The 'donations' are candidate-to-candidate committee transfers to Shea and Howard, not personal contributions, so no industry label applies.

name: Curtis, Matthew
resolved_employer: Smart City Policy Group (founder); former public-policy head at HomeAway/Expedia; ex-aide to two Austin mayors
evidence: Matt Curtis founded Smart City Policy Group (2017), an Austin government-affairs/public-policy consultancy for tech and short-term-rental interests; he previously ran global public policy for HomeAway/Expedia and was a senior aide to the last two Austin mayors. Record lists 'Founder, Smart City Policy Group' and an Austin 78723 address matching him.

name: Clark, Mark
evidence: 'Mark Clark' is an extremely common name (500+ in Texas) and the record has no occupation/employer. A West Lake Hills/78746 address and single gift to Shea can't be tied to any specific individual (e.g., an Austin critical-care MD by the same name practices outside that zip). Not confidently identifiable.

name: Kirk Watson Campaign
resolved_employer: Candidate campaign committee of Kirk Watson (Mayor of Austin; former state senator)
evidence: Not an individual: this is the officeholder campaign committee of Kirk Watson, Austin Mayor and former Democratic state senator (Austin 78768 PO-box zip). Its 'gifts' to Travillion and Shea are candidate-committee transfers, so no industry label applies.

name: Broaddus, James
evidence: James (Jim) A. Broaddus, PhD/PE civil engineering (UT Austin), founded and leads Broaddus & Associates, a West Lake Hills (1301 S Capital of Texas Hwy, 78746) construction/facilities program-management firm; the firm HQ matches the donor's 78746 address. He served 20 years in the U.S. Navy (Camp David CO under Reagan) before an academic/UT System construction career. His federal giving skews heavily Republican (179 gifts, lean ~0.01).
